name: human-approval
title: Human Approval
description: An explicit approval surface for consequential tool calls.

notes: The component records no authority; the server must bind, expire, consume, and audit each grant.
Status is announced with aria-live, decisions use explicit labels, and resolved controls are disabled.

documentation.whenToUse: Use after the server creates a durable request for a write or irreversible action.
documentation.whenNotToUse: Do not interrupt cheap, read-only, reversible work or treat a client callback as authorization.
tradeoffs: The UI collects intent but cannot enforce authorization.
